behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names both files (universal_marker.rs, export/mod.rs), the Edge enum, conflict_marker_reachability function, and suggests parameter names (scope_package, etc.) and field names (dep_extras, etc.) that tests check for.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what's broken and what should change structurally, but doesn't give specific code/line-level fixes.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests accept multiple parameter name variants (scope_package/package_name/scope/pkg_name/current_package) and field variants (dep_extras/extras/child_extras/activated_extras), and check for any of several indicator patterns.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: F2p tests (test_resolve_handles_package_scope, test_edge_carries_dep_extras, test_unencoded_extra_lookup, test_dep_extras_fed_into_conflict_map) all rely on reading source text and regex/substring checks rather than executing the code; cargo tests are only pass-to-pass and timeout-tolerant.

test_not_tautological.reason: test_unencoded_extra_lookup falls back to scanning the entire file source if body extraction fails, so merely adding a 'scope_package' parameter and a 'name.clone()' usage anywhere in the file would satisfy it; similarly test_dep_extras_fed_into_conflict_map scans whole file when body is small.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Instruction promises 'uv export --extra cpu ... should produce correct marker expressions' but no test actually runs uv export or verifies output markers; only structural code-shape checks are performed.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comments (pass-to-pass CI, fail-to-pass core, regression) and named descriptively.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is code-internal; no external structured data output.

no_typos.reason: File paths and identifiers appear consistent across instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Files are named as the task domain requires; no specific line numbers leaked.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: This is a code-only task, no config-edits involved.
